description: The Camorra is a criminal organization originating from Campania, Italy, one of the oldest and most powerful in Italy, with historical roots dating back to the 19th century. It is organized into autonomous groups called clans involved in drug trafficking, extortion, public contracts, and money laundering, and infiltrates local politics. The term 'Camorra' continues to be used to describe recurring criminal forms in Naples and Campania.

country_links.evidence_quote: Nel 2016 Salvatore Iavarone, broker in Sud America rappresentante del clan Tamarisco di Torre Annunziata , è stato arrestato in Ecuador . Si ritiene che Iavarone sia il collegamento principale per la spedizione di narcotici dall'Ecuador all'Europa.
country_links.context: The Camorra's broker Salvatore Iavarone was arrested in Ecuador, where he was the main link for shipping narcotics from Ecuador to Europe.

country_links.evidence_quote: La chiusura del porto franco di Tangeri in Marocco nel 1961 sposta i depositi delle società di tabacco verso le coste iugoslave e albanesi...
country_links.context: The Camorra used Morocco as a source for cigarette smuggling after the closure of the free port of Tangier.
